sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id Int32, bm Bitmap) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([2, 3, 4]));
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bm) AS bitmap_array FROM test_bitmap;
UPDATE test_bitmap SET bm = bitmapAnd(bm, bitmapBuild([2, 3, 5])) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapAnd(bm, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]))) AS result FROM test_bitmap;
